old_example: She placed a small terracotta flowerpot on the windowsill to brighten up the room.
new_example: She placed a small flowerpot on the windowsill.
new_translation: Cô ấy đặt một chiếc chậu hoa nhỏ trên bậu cửa sổ.

old_example: A row of colorful flowerpots was arranged along the patio to create a welcoming atmosphere.
new_example: A row of colorful flowerpots was arranged along the patio.
new_translation: Một dãy các chậu hoa rực rỡ được sắp xếp dọc theo hiên nhà.

old_example: The fresh tropical fruits are flown in daily from South America to ensure that they are as fresh as possible for the customers.
new_example: The fresh tropical fruits are flown in daily from South America.
new_translation: Các loại trái cây nhiệt đới tươi được vận chuyển bằng máy bay hàng ngày.

old_example: The constant fluctuation of exchange rates makes it difficult for international businesses to predict their long-term profits and costs.
new_example: The fluctuation of exchange rates makes it difficult to predict profits.
new_translation: Sự biến động của tỷ giá hối đoái làm khó dự đoán lợi nhuận.

old_example: The doctor advised the patient to drink plenty of fluids to help recovery from the flu.
new_example: The doctor advised the patient to drink plenty of fluids.
new_translation: Bác sĩ khuyên bệnh nhân uống nhiều chất lỏng.

old_example: The plumber advised the homeowner to flush the pipes with a specialized cleaning solution to prevent clogs and buildup.
new_example: The plumber advised the homeowner to flush the pipes.
new_translation: Người thợ sửa ống nước đã khuyên chủ nhà xả các đường ống.

old_example: The world-renowned flutist performed a stunning solo that left the audience in awe of her technical skill and musicality.
new_example: The renowned flutist performed a stunning solo today.
new_translation: Nghệ sĩ thổi sáo nổi tiếng đã trình diễn một bản đơn ca tuyệt đẹp.

old_example: The marketing team distributed thousands of flyers in the downtown area to promote the grand opening of the new department store.
new_example: The team distributed thousands of flyers to promote the grand opening.
new_translation: Đội ngũ đã phân phát hàng ngàn tờ rơi để quảng bá buổi khai trương.
